titleStmt.title: SII 36.112: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 112. (A.R. No. 112 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Māgāḷēśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged in the beginning. The inscription is connected with the previous one (No. 111) above. Registers the grant of release document (viḍu-tīṭṭu) of a piece of land as tirunāmattukkāṇi by Rācavallavap Pallavaraiyar in favour of the deity Chaṇḍēśvara in the temple of Mudupagavar at Ambar in Ambar-nāḍu. Since the land in dispute was under the enjoyment of the temple authorities till the 13th year of Kulōttuṅga III (A.D. 1191), it was deceited that the individual claimant had no moral right of possession. The document was attested by several persons.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
poyyāta nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ce ppat tirumakaḷuñ jeyamakaḷuñ ciṟantu vāḻa veṇmati poṟkoṭai viḷaṅka velventaraṭi vaṇaṅka maṇmaṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉuvāti taḻaittoṅkac cakkaramuñ ceṅkolun tikkaṉaittuñ celanaṭāttak kaṟpakālam puvikākkap poṟpamaiṉta muṭipuṉaintu taṇ
koṇṭu vikkiramapāṇṭiyaṟku kūṭal mānakar kuṭuttu ne Eṭuttu ruṉta vīrapāṇṭiyan muṭittalai koṇṭamarmuṭittavan mutalaṭikaḷiraiver veṟṟippukalaṟṟu kollampukka teṉnanum mikka ceranum vantu malaraṭi vaṇaṅka Avan muṭimelaṭi vaittuc ce
ṉtamiḻ nāṭṭaraicum teṉnavanukkaḷittaruḷi vīrakkaḻal punaintaruḷi vīrakkoṭit tiyākakkoṭi Eṭuttuk kaitavarkon kātalanaip perkāṭṭak kaṇṭaruḷi celvattuṭan Ellaiyil paricaṭṭam nalki mīnavanām vīrakeraḷan veḷaikoṇṭu viraṟ taṟintut tāṉaṭimai pukutalāṟ tāratipar peṟā vāḻvaḷittup pakkattilirunta vaṇṇapparikala pariccinnam nalkit tikkeṭṭum
Ēval keṭkkac cakkiraveṟpiṟ pukaḻeṟittuc cempon vīrasimhāsanattup puvanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāna tribhuvanac cakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷina śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu patineḻāvatu ( tribhuvanaccakkaravaṟtikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiṉa
śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu patineḻāvatu) Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Amparil Uṭaiyār mutupakavar koyil Āticaṇṭe var kanmikaḷukkuc ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān Araiyan nampiyāḻvāṉāṉa rājavallavap pallavaraiyaṉen viṭutīṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Innāyanār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāna taḷiccuṟṟu Uḷḷū(r)
ṟkaḷil nāṉ rājarājapperuvilai koṇṭeṉeṉṟu colli Anupavittu vanta nilam munnāḷile Ikkoyiṟtāṉattār tevar tirunāmattile kā ṭukki ṭom In nilam viṭaveṇumenṟu Ivarkaḷ connamaiyil Ivarkaḷum nānum vecālip paraiyar keṭkiṟa Ārācciyile toṭaippaṭṭuk keṭṭu Aṟṟa toṭaiccenṟu nilaiyum nāṉ rāja
rājapperuvilai koṇṭenākak kāṭṭiya piramāṇaṅkaḷum perumpaṟṟa koyiṟ kaṭṭaṇattukkuk kulottuṅkacoḻan tiruvācaṟpuṟavāy va ttuc cāmantar kūṭattil vāṇāthirājarum nuḷampāthirājarum nāruṅ kacciyarāyarum paḻantiyarāyarum Irukka vecālipparaiyar Āḷum Ivar Ārāycci keṭkiṟa paṭṭarkaḷum ciṟukkaṇakkaroṭuṅ kūṭavarak kāṭṭi
k kēṭṭa Iṭattu nāṉ rājasā tanamāy nirampāmaiyilum toṭaic cenṟu yiru Innilam tevar tirunāmattile Uṭaiyār rājā kku nālāvatu nāḷile rājarājap peruvilaikkuk kācu Oṭukkik koṇṭu Innāyanāṟku patin
mūṉṟāvatu varaiyum tevarey Anupavittu l koṇṭu vantamaiyilum Innilam Enakkup prāptamillāmaiya natevaṟku Iṟuttu vantatil Aiñce cinnam Uṭpaṭa patiṉāṟāvatu nāḷiṟ stānattār Aḷantu kaṇṭatākac coṉna nilam Āṟe cinnamum paḻampaṭiye Ittevaṟkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṭṭu vi
ṭutīṭṭuk kuṭutteṉ Āticaṇṭe[ śvara] devar kku �yan nampiyāḻvānāna rājavallavap pallavaraiyanen Ivar cālla Ivviṭutīṭṭu Eḻutinēn rājarāja vaḷanāṭṭup pulivalak kūṟṟattuc cenni nallūruṭaiyān maturāntakatevan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉeḻuttu nān Anupavikkira nilam viṭṭa
vai rājavallavap palla yaṉeḻuttu I tiruvācaṟkūṟu perumaṅkalamuṭaiyān tillaināyakan tirucci lamuṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Anniyūruṭaiyān neriyan pallavaraiyanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven pāmpura nāṭṭuk koṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Ittevar tevatānam
ṇiyuṭaiya māta yāṉ Ātiviṭa van It tevar tevatānam taḷikkūṟṟuk ṟkāṇiyuṭaiya nariyanūruṭaiyān Āṭuntiruk kūttaneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Uṭaiyār tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār tevatānam Irumuṭi coḻanallūriṟ kāṇi Uṭaiya pūcaṅkuṭaiyān tillaināya
k kīḻiruntāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven pā ttan ṉeḻuttu ....ippaṭi Aṟiven koyililuṅ kalveṭṭu Uṇṭu Innilam puravari viḷākam .
Digital edition of SII 36.112 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
